calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Appearances:
Katarina Rost, Esq. for Plaintiff USF. The Student Loan Coordinator, Raymond Rogers also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant.
Damages of $1,316.79
Attorney's fees of $1,500.00
Costs of $253.50
Interest of $759.80. For the total of $3,830.09
Judgment signed in open court.
